Log:
  MFH: r432760

  - Rename patch-src-Sblib.cxx to patch-src_Sblib.cxx and
    regenerate with 'make makepatch'
  - Add patch-src_fs.cxx to enable Dposix_fadvise
  - Add patch-src_wit.cxx to fix fails to build with clang 4.0 [1]
